query.query_string: Phentermine AND postural orthostatic tachycardia syndrome

data.query: Phentermine AND postural orthostatic tachycardia syndrome

results.title: Stimulant medication and postural orthostatic tachycardia syndrome: a tale of two cases.
results.abstract: Stimulant medication may mimic the tachycardia of postural orthostatic tachycardia syndrome. Two case histories illustrate how missing the clinical distinction between a primary dysautonomia and a medication effect may have avoidable adverse consequences.
results.journal: Clinical autonomic research : official journal of the Clinical Autonomic Research Society
